branching-transversal-cert.last_note: VERIFIED: Lean tight branching B&B transversal cert (noTransLe + noTransLe_sound + hLe_of_branchCert) closes the R3 fractional integrality gap, reaching integral tau=6 on A_base => tight h<=8 (vs fractional <=9). lake build PASS, clean axioms (decide facts axiom-free, no sorry/native_decide). Independently re-derived: 12 APs = full family, exact tau=6, bridge arith. Machinery only, does NOT beat 4/7; removes the prerequisite blocker for a tight N~30 cert.
branching-transversal-cert.summary: Depth-bounded branch-and-bound transversal certificate in Lean: structurally-recursive certifyTau (remaining, budget) Bool returning true iff no transversal of size <= budget exists; soundness induction gives tau > budget => h(A) <= N - budget - 1. Closes the fractional integrality gap (tight h(A_base)=8, tau>=6). Load-bearing prerequisite for any sub-4/7 Lean cert. A_base validation tree 364 nodes / 3^5=243 worst-case leaves, decide-tractable, zero sorry.

bridge-combos-completeness-half.last_note: VERIFIED: C5bCombos.lean lake build PASS, axioms clean (propext/Quot.sound only, no Classical.choice, no sorry/native_decide). mem_combos_of_sublist (include/exclude induction on custom combos recurrence) + combos_complete (Perm form). Coverage independently re-derived: combos l 4 = exactly C(n,4) 4-subsets at n=6,7,8,14. combos_complete + l.Nodup genuinely discharges the perm-half's CombosComplete (verified by type-checking the composition); only the trivial Nodup-carrying assembly wrapper remains for next round.
bridge-combos-completeness-half.summary: Lean: standalone combos_complete — every 4 pairwise-distinct elements of l.toFinset (Nodup l) appear in some order as a member of combos l 4, by include/exclude induction on the custom combos recurrence. Isolates the hard induction.

bridge-perm-invariance-half.last_note: VERIFIED: C5bBridgePerm.lean lake build PASS, axioms clean (propext/Classical.choice/Quot.sound, no sorry/native_decide). countDistinct_perm + diffs4B_perm4 (24-ordering invariance via compositional pdiffs) + assembled is45setB_to_Is45 modulo named CombosComplete hyp (not smuggled). Perm-invariance independently re-derived in Python (both True/False outcomes preserved). Composition with combos-half type-checks axiom-clean.
bridge-perm-invariance-half.summary: Lean: diffs4B permutation-invariance (countDistinct_perm + 24-ordering Perm discharge) + assembly of is45setB l → Is45 l.toFinset modulo a named combos_complete hypothesis (MTThm15-style, no sorry/axiom).

cegar-direct-floor-feasibility-N16-N17.summary: Unified CP-SAT/SMT/CEGAR feasibility model searching directly for a floor-realizing (4,5)-set at N=17 (h=9, ratio 9/17≈0.529, most margin) or N=16 (h=9, 0.5625 thin); tight window + transversal cuts to escape round-1 CP-SAT scaling; Lean cert via decide, fallback at N=17.

cpsat-exact-existence-N28-N30.last_note: NEGATIVE exact-alpha search for indecomposable N in {30,32,34} (4,5)-set at h=floor+1. Independently reproduced: best is a Fibonacci-subsequence family, exact alpha=floor+3 (N=30: alpha=19, is45set=True, indecomposable, milp==bb and my independent B&B agree). No beat. tau-deficit 2 at every N (best tau-density ~0.367 vs needed ~0.433). Heuristic search so not an impossibility theorem; honestly scoped as conjecture-only obstruction map, nothing written to constants/5b.md. Pairs with interleaved cert but the half-integral A_base degeneracy means even a found candidate must be non-half-integral to certify tightly.
cpsat-exact-existence-N28-N30.summary: Exact MILP/B&B existence probe (scipy.milp / custom B&B, not ortools) for an indecomposable N=30 (4,5)-set with h<=17 (17/30~0.5667) seeded outside the A_base basin; (4,5) difference condition + indecomposability (Lemma 3.6) as constraints, exact-alpha oracle from R2. Produces only a CONJECTURE witness (cannot move held) that feeds the Lean h-cert track. N=28 h=16 ties 4/7, rejected.

decidable-bridge-is45-full.last_note: R10: unconditional bridge is45setB l=true → l.Nodup → Is45 l.toFinset assembled + Abase cap corollary (threeAPs card ≤ 12) fired on concrete engine gadget. lake build PASS (8570 jobs), all 5 theorems axioms [propext,Classical.choice,Quot.sound] only — no sorry/native_decide/smuggled axiom. Reviewer reproduced build + axioms + type-checked exact claims; cap lemma now wired to concrete engine, multi-round cap-wiring thread closed. No bound move (held 4/7).
decidable-bridge-is45-full.summary: Lean: full is45setB l → Is45 l.toFinset bridge (combos_complete induction + diffs4B perm-invariance + assembly), wiring C5bCap.m_le_n_sub_2 into the concrete engine with a fired corollary on Abase. Highest value, two-part, riskiest.

engine-is45set-difference-fix.last_note: VERIFIED: engine re-keyed to correct (4,5)-set difference condition (is45setB); MTThm15 + c5b_le_four_sevenths now sound. Clean rebuild, axioms clean, separating set {0,2,5,8,14,21,28} correctly rejected. Closes R2 soundness gap. No bound move (held 4/7).
engine-is45set-difference-fix.summary: Re-key the Lean engine from weakSidonB (sums) to a decidable is45setB difference predicate (every 4-sublist >=5 distinct |x-y|, C(N,4) decide); re-verify A_base certifies 4/7 zero-axiom. No bound move, but a hard correctness prerequisite — the current MTThm15 would falsely certify a weak-Sidon non-(4,5) gadget.

floorplus1-transversal-N30.last_note: VERIFIED: hLe_of_fracMatching LP-duality soundness lemma fully proven (no sorry, axioms clean, double-counting core re-derived independently). Validated on A_base giving h<=9. Honest integrality gap (nu*=4.5, tau=6) confirmed via scipy — no overclaim. Reusable machinery, no bound move (held 4/7); tight h<=8 / N=30 gadget deferred.
floorplus1-transversal-N30.summary: Indecomposable N=30 (4,5)-set at h=floor+1=17 (17/30~0.5667 beats 4/7). Buildable sub-goal: an AP-transversal h<=m certificate (covering family F over 3-APs, decide cost poly in |F|*N not C(30,18)), validated on A_base. Only Lean route to h-certification at N>=21.

guided-search-N21.last_note: No strict beat (best ratio ties 4/7). But verified a real obstruction: from proven c*>=9/17, size-N gadget beats 4/7 only if 7*ceil(9N/17)<4N — independently confirmed N=14 and N=21 are IMPOSSIBLE (floors 8,12 hit 4/7 exactly). Feasible N: 9,11,13,15,16,17,18,20,22,... Window-limited search found no beat at N=9,11 (suggestive only, not global). Reshapes the angle: next searches must target feasible N, not 14/21.
guided-search-N21.summary: Optimization-guided (SAT/CP/annealing) search directly minimizing max-Sidon-subset size for a ~21-pt (4,5)-set with h/N < 4/7, then certify via the Lean predicates.

half-integrality-filtered-search.last_note: R7 survey, now reviewed: re-run exit 0 all asserts pass. RAND30 (N=30 (4,5)-set, 0 viol) has INTEGRAL cover LP (nu*=10=tau, all x_v in {0,1}) and is interleaved-FRIENDLY at g=1 (support P: 10/12 edges inside, a(P)=8 + tau(res)=2 = 10) -- all independently reproduced. Retires the certifiability risk that A_base's half-integral pathology is universal. No bound (alpha=20). 5b.md/current.md untouched.
half-integrality-filtered-search.summary: Fold an LP-half-integrality filter into the N=30 high-m gadget search: for each density-clearing candidate solve the 3-AP cover LP and reward supports that are partially integral (not fully half-integral like A_base) so the R5 interleaved cert can shrink the branch budget. De-risks certifiability of any beat; yields a verified structural survey even with no beat.

hybrid-fractional-plus-branch.last_note: VERIFIED: Lean hLe_of_hybrid (le_min of fractional + branching tau-bounds) validated on A_base, min 9 8 = 8 tight. lake build PASS, clean axioms. SOUND but a small increment: confirmed honest scope - it is the MAX composition only, does NOT shrink the branch budget (A_base still at full k=5), so the N~30 scaling it is named for is NOT achieved. The interleaved residual-budget cert is the deferred load-bearing step.
hybrid-fractional-plus-branch.summary: Combine the verified fractional lemma (tau >= ceil(nu*), cheap) with the branching cert on the residual via max of two independent sound lower bounds, keeping branch budget = target tau - ceil(nu*) so 3^budget stays tiny at N=30 (budget 1-2 vs standalone 12-13). The version that scales the h-cert to the N=30 gadget. Depends on branching-transversal-cert; budget-1 A_base validation is a clean one-round increment.

interleaved-residual-cert.last_note: Sound interleaved (fix-then-branch) Lean lemma hLe_of_interleaved built: disjoint H∩P / H\P partition (no double-count, verified structurally + clean axioms propext/Classical.choice/Quot.sound, no sorry/native_decide). Budget-shrink mechanism (a=2 frac + g=1 branch => tau=4) demonstrated end-to-end on synthetic A_syn — the shrink R4 max-hybrid could not do. Honest finding (independently reproduced over all 2^14 supports): A_base is fully half-integral, max(a+tau_res)=6 only at P=empty, so g=1-on-A_base is genuinely impossible and the cert degenerates to full budget there. Machinery advance, does NOT beat 4/7. Bound-mover prerequisite still needs a non-half-integral N~30 candidate to fire.
interleaved-residual-cert.summary: Branch-only-over-the-LP-residual transversal lemma hLe_of_branchOnResidual: refactor hLe_of_fracMatching to expose its dual support, contract the residual family, branch with budget g=tau-a (1-2 units so 3^g tiny at N=30). The named scaling prerequisite the R4 plain-min hybrid is NOT; validate on A_base with g=1 -> tight h<=8. Soundness backed by Nemhauser-Trotter / d-Hitting-Set LP half-integrality (fix LP value >=1/2, branch residual).

lean-cap-lemma-m-le-n-minus-2.last_note: Lean cap lemma m_le_n_sub_2 over faithful Is45 predicate: lake build PASS, axioms clean (propext/Classical.choice/Quot.sound, no sorryAx/native_decide). FACT1 (double-midpoint forces 4-subset with <=4 distinct |diffs|) re-derived independently; Is45 verified permutation-faithful to is45setB, non-vacuous. Missing decidable bridge is_45setB->Is45 is a legit next increment, not fatal.
lean-cap-lemma-m-le-n-minus-2.summary: Formalize Lemma 2.4 in Lean: for any is45setB list, m(A)=#midpoint-distinct 3-APs <= n-2, via FACT1 (a vertex midpoint of two 3-APs forces a 4-subset with exactly 4 distinct |diffs|, contradicting >=5) giving an injective midpoint map into the n-2 interior. New lean/Constants/C5bCap.lean, lake-build-checked, clean axioms, no search/anneal — immune to the force-kill failure mode. Replaces the trusted external Lemma 2.4 the whole cap/tau analysis rests on.

lean-scaffold-and-warmup.last_note: lake build passes; finite facts Abase_weakSidon & Abase_hLe8 decide with ZERO axioms (kernel only, no sorry/native_decide); combos enumerates all 2002 size-9 subsets (verified via #eval); h(A_base)=8 re-derived independently in Python. Reproduces record 4/7 (no beat). Reusable engine: future gadget = list swap + re-decide. Bridge (Thm 1.5) is explicit hypothesis MTThm15, not smuggled.
lean-scaffold-and-warmup.summary: Build reusable Lean decidable predicates is45set + hLe (Sidon=no-3-AP) and certify the record 14-pt gadget at c*<=4/7; foundation every later beat reuses.

milp-coord-place-N30.summary: Exact-optimal MILP placing N=30 integer points with the (4,5) difference condition (lazy quad separation) + 3-AP indicators + transversal layer, solved to optimality or a proven dual bound over a fixed window — turns the heuristic wall into a window-restricted theorem (no α<18 in window W) or yields a witness. Numerical cert; tractability via lazy constraints is the risk.

modular-construction.summary: Algebraic/modular (4,5)-set whose weak-Sidon and small-h are provable by congruence/counting (sum-injectivity + AP-pigeonhole), aiming for a provable family below 4/7.

stage-a-max-m-bounded-N30.last_note: Verified NEGATIVE over fixed pool P (|P|=1461, window<=2200): max m=26<cap 28; frontier m=26 alpha=20, m=25 alpha=21, both genuine (4,5)-sets, exact alpha re-derived from-scratch (milp==bb==my-own-BB), no beat. Honestly scoped (wall over P, not global). Sharper than R5 blind-alpha wall (direct max-m, bounded window). No bound written.
stage-a-max-m-bounded-N30.summary: Bounded-compute max-m gadget search at N=30 over a FIXED finite candidate pool (greedy/Fibonacci-lattice coords within window ~1500-2200): Stage A maximizes m (cheap incremental midpoint-distinct 3-AP count, NOT exact-alpha) in hard wall-clock chunks, printing (best m, count, elapsed) per chunk; Stage B runs exact alpha=N-tau only on the tiny m>=27 shell. Either a beat (m=28/alpha<=17 => 17/30) or a sharper VERIFIED NEGATIVE (max m < 28 over the named pool). Progress-emitting, hard-capped — the reframe of the twice-force-killed blind anneal.

transversal-ilp-floor-search-N15.last_note: No beat at N=15 (cert runs, exact-h via B&B). Surfaced the verified definitional correction (4,5)-set = difference condition, strictly stronger than weak-Sidon; flags Lean engine MTThm15 soundness gap. BUT its specific "h=10 obstruction wall" claim is wrong — N18 cert exhibits a genuine 15-pt (4,5)-set with h=9. Negative result sound, obstruction claim not verified.
transversal-ilp-floor-search-N15.summary: Exact independence-number gadget search at N=15 (target h=8, ratio 8/15≈0.533) via alpha=N-tau with a min-3-AP-transversal ILP; smallest feasible N, largest small-N margin, certifies in the zero-axiom Lean decide engine (C(15,9)=5005).

transversal-ilp-floor-search-N18.last_note: No beat at N=18 (best genuine (4,5)-set h=11, 1-swap local min; floor h=10 not realized). Cert reproduces deterministically. Verified strategic finding: floor+1 first beats 4/7 only at N=30 (17/30), redirecting the search target. Small-N gadget angle structurally squeezed.
transversal-ilp-floor-search-N18.summary: Same transversal-ILP floor search retargeted to N=18 (target h=10, ratio 10/18≈0.556) seeded from structured covering designs; more room to pack overlapping 3-APs, hedges N15 window tightness; Lean cert near decide edge (C(18,11)=31824, transversal-certificate fallback if OOM).
